null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "### Details

The state diagram and any other diagram type that routes user-controlled style strings through createCssStyles parser for Mermaid v11.14.0 and earlier captures `classDef` values with an unrestricted regex:

```jison
// packages/mermaid/src/diagrams/state/parser/stateDiagram.jison:83
<CLASSDEFID>[^\n]*   { this.popState(); return 'CLASSDEF_STYLEOPTS' }
```

The value passes unsanitized through `addStyleClass()` -> `createCssStyles()` -> `style.innerHTML` (mermaidAPI.ts:418). A `}` in the value closes the generated CSS selector, and everything after becomes a new CSS rule on the page.

### PoC

```
stateDiagram-v2 
      classDef x }*{ background-image: url("http://media.giphy.com/media/SggILpMXO7Xt6/giphy.gif")}
```

Live demo:
<https://mermaid.live/edit#pako:eNpFjzFvgzAQhf-KdVNbEcBgMHhtlkqtOnSJKi8ONsYKBmRMlRTx3-skanvTfbp7996t0IxSAYPZC6_2Rmgn7O4rQ00v5nmvWnRG29OKjqI5aTcug9wZK7RiaHH9A4fO-4kliVXSiFibqbvEzWjvnHxo_fI6vR3e6cGXyX2qTcvhcYMItDMSmHeLisAqZ8UVYeUDQhx8p6ziwEIrhTtx4MNVM4nhcxztrywE0h2wVvRzoGWS_z_8rahBKvcckntgmN5OAFvhDIzUNCZZQXCR5nVaZkUEF2BVFpOcEkoxxhUuyRbB980yjStapKHqoKFlhvPtB7BFZEU>

### Patches

This has been patched in:

- [v11.15.0](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/mermaid%4011.15.0) (see [e9b0f34d8d82a6260077764ee45e1d7d90957a0f](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/commit/e9b0f34d8d82a6260077764ee45e1d7d90957a0f))
- [v10.9.6](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v10.9.6) (see [8fead23c59166b7bab6a39eac81acebee2859102](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/commit/8fead23c59166b7bab6a39eac81acebee2859102))

### Workarounds

Setting [`"securityLevel": "sandbox"`](https://mermaid.js.org/config/schema-docs/config.html#securitylevel)  will prevent this, by rendering the mermaid diagram in a sandboxed `<iframe>`.

### Impact

 Enables page defacement, user tracking via `url()` callbacks, and DOM attribute exfiltration via CSS `:has()` selectors.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00338, "percentile": 0.2551}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xcj9-5m2h-648r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T19:36:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xcj9-5m2h-648r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xcj9-5m2h-648r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41148"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-22T23:16:53Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T19:36:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/security/advisories/GHSA-xcj9-5m2h-648r", "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/commit/8fead23c59166b7bab6a39eac81acebee2859102", "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/commit/e9b0f34d8d82a6260077764ee45e1d7d90957a0f", "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/mermaid%4011.15.0", "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v10.9.6", "https://mermaid.js.org/config/schema-docs/config.html#securitylevel", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41148", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xcj9-5m2h-648r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mermaid-js/mermaid/security-advisories/GHSA-xcj9-5m2h-648r", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid", "summary": "Mermaid: Improper sanitization of `classDefs` in diagrams leads to CSS injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:20:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xcj9-5m2h-648r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "11.15.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "mermaid"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 11.0.0-alpha.1, <= 11.14.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "10.9.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "mermaid"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 10.9.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Mermaid: Improper sanitization of `classDefs` in diagrams leads to CSS injection
